what_it_does: This file stores a channel attachment record that maps an attachment id to an image asset located at image://design-assets/icons/Property_Wizard in the design-assets channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
The target field uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Property_Wizard.
It has an added timestamp of 2026-06-22T12:26:23.890745+00:00.
The id is att-d5f33139 and the channel is design-assets.
standouts: Attachment metadata for a Property_Wizard icon in the design-assets channel.
Use of an image:// URI scheme for the target asset.
No descriptive or alt-text content beyond the frontmatter fields.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References assets via a URI-style target path.
concerns: The target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
There is no alt text, dimensions, mime type, or author metadata.
The added timestamp is dated 2026, which is later than the current date.
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry for a Property_Wizard icon in the design-assets channel, carrying only frontmatter metadata.
questions: What UI feature or component is the Property_Wizard icon intended for?
Does the image file at image://design-assets/icons/Property_Wizard actually exist?

purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment metadata record and it records exactly one image attachment reference.
intention_signals: It appears to register a design asset (an icon) in a channel memory ledger so it can be discovered and referenced by attachment id and channel.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme used in the target field is a notable, non-filesystem addressing choice.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, timestamped attachment entry that links a named icon asset into the design-assets channel for later retrieval or reference.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record in the design-assets channel referencing the image asset image://design-assets/icons/Property_Wizard with id att-d5f33139.
